events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from Chinese Hospital for client 1145. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: diabetic. Allergies: none. Sodium ceiling 800 mg/meal, carbs 45–60 g/meal. Prefers Mexican; dislikes coconut milk. Cooking ability: microwave. 10 meals/week, zone Chinatown.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Calabacitas con Pollo
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 43 g outside 45–60 g range.

events.title: Rejected: Chicken Pozole Verde
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 43 g outside 45–60 g range.

events.title: Matched: Turkey Picadillo with Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 440/800 mg ✓, carbs 48 g (target 45–60) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Chicken Fajita Bowl
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 450/800 mg ✓, carbs 57 g (target 45–60) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Chicken Tinga with Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 454/800 mg ✓, carbs 48 g (target 45–60) ✓.

events.title: Batch allocated: Chicken Congee with Scallions
events.detail: Serving drawn from scheduled batch B2 (100 servings, 7 labor hours on 2026-07-20).

events.title: Donation D002 feeds batch B2
events.detail: Fresh Bok Choy (cases), Carrots (25 lb bags) from Bay Area Produce Exchange — triaged as kitchen ingredient.

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1145 added to route R-CHIN-1 (Chinatown), delivery 2026-07-21, window 12:00–14:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1145: 10 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 1. 0 hard-constraint violations.
